codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested adapter/coordinator/service structure and broad test coverage, but one launch-coordination bug violates the deterministic concurrency requirement; a secondary error-typing inconsistency was also found.

issues.description: Launch cleanup runs in an un-awaited deferred Task (`defer { Task { await coordinator.endLaunch(...) } }`). On failure paths, `launchBrowser(for:)` can return before pending state is cleared, so immediate retries for the same profile can nondeterministically fail with 'Launch already in progress'. This breaks the requirement for deterministic concurrency handling.

`buildSafariLaunch` collapses kind mismatch and type mismatch into `.profileTypeMismatch(expected: .safari, actual: profile.browserType)`. For non-browser profiles this hides the more actionable `.profileKindMismatch` typed error used elsewhere.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker did not fully follow the switcher-core-worker step to read mission AGENTS.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md before implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 327eb8bb-a4a2-4d46-a26a-6891fb6b3825 contains reads of mission.md/validation files and .factory/library/architecture.md, but no read of mission AGENTS.md or .factory/library/user-testing.md.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Handoff commit metadata was not reproducible as written (full SHA did not resolve), which weakens review traceability.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff file records commitId `e345428f05e09f4e37fb89cf4c1e36c38f7b6b7a`; `git show` on that object fails. The actual commit in repo is `e34542871d972baba6ee79bdc6c89a4a619c2812` (resolves from short hash).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test target-membership gotcha for newly added switcher tests appears to be a recurring workflow issue but is not captured in shared mission guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff 'whatWasLeftUndone' notes `SwitcherBrowserLaunchTests.swift` was not included in the Xcode project target, preventing scoped xcodebuild-only-testing verification at that point.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton and commit diff for switcher-browser-launch-adapter. Implementation mostly matches scope, but a blocking async cleanup race in launch coordination violates deterministic concurrency expectations; report marked fail with one additional non-blocking error-typing issue and shared-state observations.
